final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: luxury jewelry product shot, square crop
Primary request: photorealistic extreme close-up of a sapphire ring with diamond pavé setting, light refracting as vivid fire and brilliance inside the gemstone
Scene/backdrop: black velvet surface, seamless dark background with subtle soft reflection
Subject: deep blue sapphire center stone with intense internal light dispersion, surrounded by micro-pavé diamonds, polished platinum or white-gold band
Style/medium: photorealistic macro product photography
Composition/framing: close-up macro shot, slight three-quarter angle, shallow depth of field to isolate the stone
Lighting/mood: focused studio spotlight creating caustic light rays and rainbow fire inside the sapphire, dramatic and luxurious
Color palette: deep royal blue sapphire + icy white diamond sparkle + cool silver metal + pure black velvet background
Materials/textures: faceted gemstone with sharp internal reflections, micro-diamond grain, brushed and polished metal band, velvet fabric weave
Constraints: preserve the internal light refraction and fire effect inside the sapphire as the hero visual element
Avoid: plastic-looking gemstone, flat lighting, overexposed highlights, artificial CGI gloss, watermark
